summary:
Found the problem (the "needle"):

The nginx config in `/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default` proxies `/api/` to the wrong port:

```nginx
location /api/ {
    proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;
    ...
}
```

Your Flask app runs on port 5000, not 5001.

**To fix:** Change `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;` to `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;`.

Would you like me to apply this fix automatically?
